description: Product Description Blackspur sturdy hooks come complete with fixing screws and are ideal for hanging shovels, garden tools, brooms, or any hangable items in a cupboard or garage. Gap between hooks measures 40mm with each hook measuring 15mm wide. Supplied in slide blister. Supplying quality products.
